comments.author: @hanabi3241
comments.text: This was such an eye-opening documentary. The stark contrast between the luxury of Banana Island and the reality in Makoko is truly thought-provoking. It really challenges the common stereotypes about Africa. Thanks for sharing this perspective!🎉 11:34

replies.author: @GlobeDiscovery-NY
replies.text: Glad that moment at 11:34 resonated with you! 🎉
